title: Mom’s Rice Pudding
content:
Mom’s Rice Pudding


Half gallon whole milk
1 cup of sugar
1 cup of carolina white rice

Combine and Cook and constantly stir (not with a wooden spoon) on medium heat uncovered. Takes about an hour.

Take it off the heat

Add two tablespoons of vanilla extract

Pour into tin tray
Add raisins
While still hot, sprinkle with cinnamon
Do not cover while still hot
Put in the fridge when it’s cool, covered
